titleStmt.title: SII 25.295: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 295. (A.R. No. 295 of 1908.) TIRUKKAḶITTAṬṬAI, KUMBHAKONAM TALUK, THANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: West wall of the central shrine in the Vēdapurīśvara temple.
This record may palaeographically be assigned to c. 10th century. In the absence of internal evidence to ascribe this epigraph to a different Parakēsarivarman, it may be one of Parāntaka.

It records a gift of one-eighth śey (vēli) of land called Vēlipperuñ-śey on the eastern bank of Sarasvati-vāykkāl to provide for food-offerings during the ardhayāma service to the deity Śrīkuḍittiṭṭaipperumāḷ at Amaninārāyaṇachchaturvēdimaṅgalam, a dēvadāna and brahmadēya on the northern bank of the river, by Ko[ṇḍ*]ampaṭṭi Dōṇaiya-kramavittan, a member of the āḷuṅgaṇam of the above village.

The name of the village Amaninārāyaṇach-chaturvēdimaṅgalam appears to have received the appellation after the time of Pallava King Nandivarman III, who had the title Amaṉi (or Avaṉi) nārāyasa. Vēmbaṟṟūr was so called in the time of Rājarāja I (See S.I.I., Vol. I, p. 325). Tirukkaḷittaṭṭai, a hamlet of Vēmbaṟṟūr, on the northern bank of the river (Kāvērī) was called Amaninārāyaṇach-chaturvēdimaṅgalam during the time of Parakēsari rulers upto the period of Rājēndra I and thereafter from the time of this king, assumed the name Śōḻamārttāṇḍa-chaturvēdimaṅgalam. Perhaps, in the last years of Rājarāja I, it got the appellation Śōḻamārttāṇḍachaturvēdimaṅgalam.
Published in S.I.I., Vol. XIX, No. 418.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī kopparakesari ( vanma(rmma)r*) kku yāṇṭu 2 10 2āvatu va
ṭa karait tevatāṉa brahmadeyam Amaninārāyaṇac caturvve
timaṅkalam yāḷuṅ kaṇattāruḷu koṇṭampaṭṭit toṇaiya krama
vittanen Ivvūr śrī kuṭittiṭṭaip perumāḷukku Arttayāmat
tukkukkuṭutta nilamāvatu saraśvativāykkāliṉ kiḻkaraivelip
peruñceyeṉṟu perkūvappaṭṭa Icceyil Eṉṉuṭai
araikkāṟ ceyum Iṟaipokki niṉṟa pokam santraādittaval
arttayāma tiruvamutukku kkuṭutta nilam Icceyil vaṭakkaṭaiya munṟumā nikkit
teṟkkaṭaiya Araikkaāṟ ceyyuk kuṭutteṉ koṇṭam paṭṭi toṇaiya(kki) krama
(ma)vittaṉnen A
rici Oru porikka
ṟi yimutu Aṭai
kāyamutu 5- cu
veṟṟilaiy Itaṉ
mamahāsabhaiyā
r ra(ā)kṣai paṉmā
heśvarar Ira
kṣai ..
Digital edition of SII 25.295 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
